title: 目標達成の後に・毎日ボーノ配信☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono wants to garner more fan interest
in her races by advertising them during her
regular cooking live streams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that plan in mind, I make my first guest
appearance on Umasta Live, and it's a resounding
success! People become intrigued by her races,
and Hishi Akebono gains more publicity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things are looking good! We have to keep up the
momentum and keep raking in more fans!
